The '''Third Ado Superiority Fleet''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial naval]] unit that patrolled the [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]] during the era of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gor Lequar]].
